title: For the day before the Sabbath, when the land was first inhabited, the praise of a Song by David. The Lord reigns; he has clothed himself with honour: the Lord has clothed and girded himself with strength; for he has established the world, which shall not be moved.

verses.t: Thy throne is prepared of old: thou art from everlasting.
The rivers have lifted up, O Lord, the rivers have lifted up their voices,
at the voices of many waters: the billows of the sea are wonderful: the Lord is wonderful in high places.

Thy testimonies are made very sure: holiness becomes thine house, O Lord, for ever. *92:1 Alex. the sabbath-day. †92:3 Alex. + the floods will lift up their waves. See Heb. ‡92:4 q. d. in answer to. §92:5 Gr. to length of days. Public Domain
